image.description: The source image to animate. The image should contain a clear subject with a stable composition suitable for animation. Supported resolutions include 1024x576, 576x1024, and 768x768.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in the video generation.

cfg_scale.description: Controls how closely the video follows the conditioning from the input image. Higher values produce videos more faithful to the input but may reduce motion quality.

motion_bucket_id.description: Controls the amount of motion in the generated video. Lower values produce less motion, higher values produce more dynamic motion.
